rounds: The 6am necklace buy — no deliberating, no second-guessing, just grabbed it. That's a win they didn't get. Painted toes on a Saturday, standing in a chemist comparing nail shades without flinching — two more they completely lost. Sleep was a mess though, 5 hours on Saturday and nearly three hours awake on Tuesday — the joy police didn't cause that, but they'll absolutely try to use it.
pattern: They're losing on the visible gay stuff and doubling down on the body stuff instead.
focus: Triniful Trial — wear the best-fitting piece for Matt
